summary: Iteration 86 - Testing Sync/Offline Mode (Phase 1 & 2). All 12 backend tests pass. Frontend verified: OfflineIndicator component present in header with correct data-testids, popover shows connection status, cache info, queue status, and 'Synchroniser maintenant' button works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All Sync/Offline backend endpoints working correctly:
- GET /api/sync/ping returns {ok:true, server_time} ✓
- GET /api/sync/snapshot returns products, clients, tables, users (sans password_hash), quick_products, menu_items, games, day_opening, counts ✓
- POST /api/sync/queue/process with create_table action returns status='ok' with _offline_origin=true and _offline_client_id markers ✓
- POST /api/sync/queue/process with same client_id returns status='duplicate' (idempotency) ✓
- POST /api/sync/queue/process with create_table for existing server_id+table_number returns status='conflict' (Admin gagne) ✓
- POST /api/sync/queue/process with update_table for non-existent table returns status='conflict' ✓
- POST /api/sync/queue/process with delete_table for non-existent table returns status='ok' (idempotent) ✓
- POST /api/sync/queue/process with create_invoice when day not open returns status='conflict' ✓
- POST /api/sync/queue/process with unknown action type returns status='error' with explicit reason ✓
- GET /api/sync/queue/status returns list of recently processed actions ✓
- POST /api/sync/queue/process with create_invoice when day IS open returns status='ok' ✓
Frontend OfflineIndicator component working correctly:
- data-testid='offline-indicator' present in header ✓
- Shows 'Sync auto' when online ✓
- data-testid='offline-popover' opens on click ✓
- Popover shows: connection status, latency, cache local info (products, clients, tables, users counts), day status ✓
- data-testid='offline-sync-now' button present and functional ✓
- Clicking 'Synchroniser maintenant' fetches /sync/snapshot and updates IndexedDB cache ✓
- Toast notification 'Données locales mises à jour' shown after sync ✓
- data-testid='offline-queue-badge' only visible when queueSize > 0 (correctly hidden when queue empty) ✓
seed_data_creation: Test tables and invoices created during backend tests were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 86 confirmed Sync/Offline Mode (Phase 1 & 2) is fully functional. Key behaviors tested: (1) GET /api/sync/ping returns ok=true with server_time, (2) GET /api/sync/snapshot returns complete data without sensitive password_hash, (3) POST /api/sync/queue/process handles create_table/update_table/delete_table/create_invoice with proper idempotency and conflict detection, (4) Admin gagne strategy enforced - conflicts resolved in favor of server state, (5) Frontend OfflineIndicator shows connection status and allows manual sync, (6) Queue badge only appears when actions are pending. Note: Day opening/closing uses /api/day-openings/{date}/open (with body) and /api/day-openings/{date}/mark-closed endpoints.
features_tested: GET /api/sync/snapshot - returns products, clients, tables, users (sans pwd hash), quick_products, menu_items, games, day_opening, counts
POST /api/sync/queue/process - create_table action with _offline_origin and _offline_client_id markers
POST /api/sync/queue/process - idempotency (duplicate detection with same client_id)
POST /api/sync/queue/process - conflict: table already exists (Admin gagne)
POST /api/sync/queue/process - conflict: update_table on non-existent table
POST /api/sync/queue/process - delete_table on non-existent table (idempotent OK)
POST /api/sync/queue/process - create_invoice when day not open (conflict)
POST /api/sync/queue/process - unknown action type (error with explicit reason)
POST /api/sync/queue/process - create_invoice when day IS open (success)
